name: agent-quality-review
description: Review Agent projects for launch readiness, quality, safety, evaluation evidence, and external dependency risk.

interface.shortDescription: Agent launch-readiness review with scoring, gates, safety checks, and reports
interface.longDescription: Evaluate Agent projects before internal demos, limited pilots, or production launch. The plugin ships a Codex skill, templates, example data, benchmark data, safety guidance, Wilson interval calculations, launch gates, and a deterministic report-generation script.
defaultPrompt: Review this Agent project for limited pilot readiness.
Generate Eval Cases for this Agent workflow.
Validate these Agent review CSV files.
